Hero.title:
Stream PC Videos
to Your Phone
Hero.description:
Play video files stored on your PC
directly in your phone's browser over Wi-Fi.
No app install — just run a single .exe file.

items.title: Wi-Fi Only
items.desc: Access from any device browser on the same network. Instantly.

items.title: No App Install
items.desc: Just open a URL in your phone's browser. That's it.

items.title: Local File Streaming
items.desc: Stream video files directly from your PC. No uploading needed.

items.title: Single Executable
items.desc: No install wizard. Run the .exe once and the server starts.

steps.title: Scan the QR Code
steps.desc: Scan the QR code shown on screen with your smartphone.

steps.title: Pick a video & play
steps.desc: Your browser opens. Select a video file and it plays instantly.

Metadata.title: HomeStream — Stream PC Videos to Your Phone
Metadata.description: Stream videos from your PC to your phone over Wi-Fi. No app needed — just run a single .exe file.
